name: Derrick Teye
title: Frontend Developer
summary: Frontend Developer with 3+ years of experience building modern, responsive web applications. I specialize in React, JavaScript, and polished UI/UX — from e-commerce storefronts and dashboards to portfolio and social products. I focus on performance, accessibility, and clean, maintainable code.
highlights: React, JavaScript, TypeScript, and modern CSS

bullets: Design and build responsive web apps for clients across e-commerce, education, and enterprise sectors.
Deliver React and Vue.js frontends with secure auth, real-time data, and optimized Core Web Vitals.
Collaborate on UI/UX, translate Figma-style requirements into accessible, production-ready interfaces.
Ship and maintain projects on Netlify with CI-friendly workflows and documented handoffs.
